exceptions.reason: No role="feed" -- the list renders as a plain <ul> carrying only its recipe class.
No role="article" on any row -- each <li> is a plain list item built from the row's own recipe classes.
No aria-labelledby or aria-label anywhere -- the <ul> carries only `[class]`, nothing else.
No aria-posinset or aria-setsize on any row -- a row's position within the feed is not exposed to assistive tech at all.
No aria-busy anywhere. The component has no concept of a pending update; it re-renders from the `items` input with no busy signal during that swap.
No keydown handling anywhere in the file; PageDown does nothing.
Same as PageDown -- no keyboard handling exists at all.
